mapper.select: SELECT id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN category = 'CARDIO' THEN 1 WHEN category = 'STRENGTH' THEN 2 WHEN category = 'BALL' THEN 3 WHEN category = 'FLEXIBILITY' THEN 4 WHEN category = 'DAILY' THEN 5 WHEN category = 'OTHER' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC
